creator: cyberbotx@cyberbotx.com
text:
- Update to 0.9.51

Port maintainer (gerald@FreeBSD.org) is cc'd.

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77

Note: Wine installs wine.1 for both en and de.UTF-8, and port test doesn't complain
about the man page still being in there for de.UTF-8, but it does complain about
not having a @dirrm command for man/de.UTF-8/man1.  I couldn't find anything in
bsd.port.mk that could help fix this.  If someone knows a way around that, let me
know how it's done.  Thanks.
